CustomField.description: An optional field intended to capture descriptive data on the applicants. Tip: Edit this help text with a description of your program's definition of overcrowding. For example, "Select yes, if the household size exceeds the number of rooms plus one.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Does the applicant live in substandard housing (more than two household members per bedroom)?
CustomField.label: Overcrowded
